channel.title: Grain Journal
channel.description: Fresh takes for film photographers shooting analog.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: home developing guide
item.description: The persistent myths around home developing guide, stress-tested against what film photographers shooting analog actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your cameras in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying cameras project for film photographers shooting analog — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/filmphotography is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the scanning community this week.

item.title: The developing checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified developing purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Shooting with Ilford Delta 100
item.description: Get the best from this iconic film stock.

item.title: A Closer Look at the Leica M6
item.description: Experience the pinnacle of rangefinder design.

item.title: The Art of Developing Black and White Film
item.description: Unleash the full potential of your black and white photographs.

item.title: Scanning Film with Epson Scanners
item.description: Digitize your film photographs with precision and ease.

item.title: Capturing Life with Kodak Portra 400
item.description: Experience the versatility and beauty of Portra 400.

item.title: Minolta SR-T 101: A Timeless SLR
item.description: Discover the charm of the Minolta SR-T 101.
